title: Thai Red Meatball Fried Rice with Crispy Egg
summary: Got leftovers from our Thai Red Chicken Meatballs with Peanut Sauce? Use them to make this gorgeous fried rice with runny fried egg. Yes please.

ingredients.label: Third of the Thai Red Chicken Meatballs with Peanut Sauce Base
ingredients.name: Third of the Thai Red Chicken Meatballs with Peanut Sauce Base

method.description: Grab your batch-cooked leftovers from the Thai Red Chicken Meatballs with Peanut Sauce: the meatballs, peanut sauce, green beans and rice.
Cut the meatballs into bite-sized pieces. Heat a glug of oil in a pan over medium heat then add the meatballs, cooking until crisp and piping hot. Pick the herb leaves.
Add the rice to the pan with the meatballs and cook until it's piping hot and starting to catch on the pan. Season with salt and pepper.
Heat another glug of oil in a small pan over a medium high heat and crack in the eggs, basting with the oil until the whites are set and the yolk runny or cooked to your liking.
Toss the herbs through the meatball rice, then plate up. Drizzle with the peanut sauce and scatter with spring onions. Drizzle with sriracha if using.

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
